buildCommand: cd ../.. && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.4 --activate && pnpm install --filter m-finance-trust... && pnpm build --filter m-finance-trust
installCommand: cd ../.. && rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.4 --activate && pnpm install --filter m-finance-trust... --no-frozen-lockfile
